scenario.name: Basic UAS responder

recv.action: <ereg regexp="<([^>]*)" search_in="hdr" start_line="true" header="Contact:" assign_to="tempRemoteContact"/> <ereg regexp="[^<].*" search_in="var" variable="tempRemoteContact" assign_to="remoteContact" check_it="true" />

scenario.send: SIP/2.0 100 Trying From:[$remoteHdr] To:[$invTo] [last_Call-ID:] Cseq:[$invCseq] INVITE Allow: INVITE,ACK,BYE,CANCEL,SUBSCRIBE,NOTIFY,MESSAGE,REFER,INFO,PRACK,PUBLISH,UPDATE [$invVia] User-Agent: AvayaTest Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 180 Ringing From:[$remoteHdr] To:[$invTo];tag=1 [last_Call-ID:] Cseq:[$invCseq] INVITE [$invVia] Require: 100rel RSeq: [$localRseq] Content-Type: application/sdp [last_Record-route:] User-Agent: Auto SIPP Supported: 100rel,sdp-anat Contact: <<sips:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Allow: INVITE,ACK,BYE,CANCEL,SUBSCRIBE,NOTIFY,MESSAGE,REFER,INFO,PRACK,PUBLISH,UPDATE Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 [$sdpVer] IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port+0] RTP/SAVP 0 8 101 c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=sendrecv a=acfg:1 t=1 a=1 a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:k8FuMlkO/O4uy4OnGiN5VIC3lxcc5MlmjuAcY0a7 UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Call-ID:] [$remoteVia] From:[$remoteHdr] To:[$localHdr] CSeq:[$remoteCseq] PRACK Contact: <<sips:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Allow: INVITE,ACK,BYE,CANCEL,SUBSCRIBE,NOTIFY,MESSAGE,REFER,INFO,PRACK,PUBLISH,UPDATE Supported: 100rel,sdp-anat Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Call-ID:] [$remoteVia] From:[$remoteHdr] To:[$localHdr] CSeq:[$remoteCseq] UPDATE Contact: <<sips:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Allow: INVITE,ACK,BYE,CANCEL,SUBSCRIBE,NOTIFY,MESSAGE,REFER,INFO,PRACK,PUBLISH,UPDATE Supported: 100rel,sdp-anat Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 [$sdpVer] IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port+0] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=sendrecv

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Call-ID:] [$remoteVia] From:[$remoteHdr] To:[$localHdr] CSeq:[$remoteCseq] UPDATE Contact: <<sips:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Allow: INVITE,ACK,BYE,CANCEL,SUBSCRIBE,NOTIFY,MESSAGE,REFER,INFO,PRACK,PUBLISH,UPDATE Supported: 100rel,sdp-anat Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 [$sdpVer] IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port+0] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=sendrecv

SIP/2.0 200 OK From:[$remoteHdr] To:[$invTo];tag=1 [last_Call-ID:] Cseq:[$invCseq] INVITE [$invVia] Supported: 100rel,sdp-anat [last_Record-route:] Content-Type: application/sdp User-Agent: Auto SIPP Allow: INVITE,ACK,BYE,CANCEL,SUBSCRIBE,NOTIFY,MESSAGE,REFER,INFO,PRACK,PUBLISH,UPDATE Contact: <<sips:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 [$sdpVer] IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port+0] RTP/SAVP 0 8 101 c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=sendrecv a=acfg:1 t=1 a=1 a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:k8FuMlkO/O4uy4OnGiN5VIC3lxcc5MlmjuAcY0a7 UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP

INVITE [$remoteContact] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[$localTransport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [$localHdr] To:[$remoteHdr] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [$localCseq] INVITE Contact: <<sips:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Supported: 100rel,sdp-anat [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Allow: INVITE,ACK,BYE,CANCEL,SUBSCRIBE,NOTIFY,MESSAGE,REFER,INFO,PRACK,PUBLISH,UPDATE Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 [$sdpVer] IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port+0] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=sendrecv

ACK [$remoteContact] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[$localTransport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [$localHdr] To:[$remoteHdr] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [$localCseq] ACK Contact: <<sips:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Allow: INVITE,ACK,BYE,CANCEL,SUBSCRIBE,NOTIFY,MESSAGE,REFER,INFO,PRACK,PUBLISH,UPDATE Subject: Performance Test Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 [$sdpVer] IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port+0] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=sendrecv

BYE [$remoteContact] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[$localTransport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From:[$localHdr] To:[$remoteHdr] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [$localCseq] BYE Contact: <<sips:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Allow: INVITE,ACK,BYE,CANCEL,SUBSCRIBE,NOTIFY,MESSAGE,REFER,INFO,PRACK,PUBLISH,UPDATE [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: 0
